text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An excited Smart Falcon comes<n>running to inform
us that the lyrics are<n>finished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The song's name, on the other hand,<n>is apparently
for me and Light Hello to<n>decide. What words
should we gift to<n>the runners?
